description: A lightweight inventory tracker with expiry awareness
name: justincase

scripts.build: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --topological --exclude justincase run build
scripts.clean: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --exclude justincase run clean
scripts.dist: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --exclude justincase run dist
scripts.lint: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --exclude justincase run lint
scripts.format: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --exclude justincase run format
scripts.test: CI=true yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --exclude justincase run test
